response.justification: Bogdan brings 20+ years of progressive engineering leadership and currently works on AI infrastructure at Naver, meeting the experience threshold. However, the role specifically requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI. This resume shows infrastructure and tooling contributions but lacks concrete evidence of building AI-powered products or strategic innovation work. The candidate appears stronger as a Principal Platform/Infrastructure Engineer than as a Principal Engineer focused on AI Strategy.
strengths: 20+ years of technical leadership across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with current Staff-level role at Naver
Proven ability to architect complex distributed systems at scale, including high-performance data pipelines and microservices infrastructure
Demonstrated commitment to knowledge sharing through workshops, open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and community mentorship
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in building AI/ML products or platforms—recent AI work focuses on infrastructure (MCP generators, agentic workflows) rather than AI-powered product innovation
Limited evidence of strategic leadership or customer advisory experience; background emphasizes technical execution and architecture over innovation strategy
Missing preferred qualification of Master's or PhD in AI-related field; no formal advanced education in machine learning or AI
